channel.title: 简报 Jae Daily · 2026年07月14日
channel.description: 国际政治 · 宏观财经 · 前沿科技 · AI 辅助分析

item.title: Trump proposes 20% toll on cargo through Strait of Hormuz; restarts Iran blockade
item.description: The Strait of Hormuz is a major oil shipping route and the epicenter of the U.S. and Israel's ongoing war with Iran.

item.title: What Anthropic’s latest AI discovery does—and doesn’t—show
item.description: This story originally appeared in The Algorithm, our weekly newsletter on AI. To get stories like this in your inbox first, sign up here. Anthropic—currently the world’s most valuable AI company, with

item.title: US judge voids Donald Trump 'improper' $1.8 billion settlement with IRS
item.description: A US judge on Monday voided a settlement between President Donald Trump and the Internal Revenue Service over leaked tax returns, ruling the lawsuit was filed for an "improper purpose." The agreement

item.title: The wildest allegations in Apple’s trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI
item.description: Apple’s trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI contains allegations that range from employees joking about unauthorized access to Apple’s systems to claims that job candidates were asked to bring Apple

item.title: 王毅同哈萨克斯坦外长科舍尔巴耶夫会谈
item.description: 新华社北京7月13日电（记者吴梦桐）中共中央政治局委员、外交部长王毅13日在北京同哈萨克斯坦外长科舍尔巴耶夫举行会谈。 王毅表示，在习近平主席和托卡耶夫总统战略引领和亲自推动下，中哈关系展现强大

item.title: 《习近平谈治国理政》第五卷吉尔吉斯斯坦推介会在比什凯克举行
item.description: 新华社比什凯克7月13日电（记者江宥林赵宇）《习近平谈治国理政》第五卷吉尔吉斯斯坦推介会13日在吉尔吉斯斯坦首都比什凯克举行。 与会嘉宾认为，在上海合作组织成立25周年之际，中吉两国各界人士以及

item.title: 国务院批复同意《扩大消费“十五五”规划》
item.description: 新华社北京7月13日电据中国政府网13日消息，国务院印发关于《扩大消费“十五五”规划》的批复，原则同意《扩大消费“十五五”规划》。批复指出，规划实施要坚持扩大内需这个战略基点，深入实施提振消费专项行动

item.title: 国务院印发《国民健康“十五五”规划》
item.description: 新华社北京7月13日电国务院日前印发《国民健康“十五五”规划》（以下简称《规划》），对“十五五”时期加快建设健康中国作出部署。 《规划》强调，坚持以习近平新时代中国特色社会主义思想为指导，坚定不

item.title: 中共中央办公厅国务院办公厅关于完善自然资源资产管理制度体系的意见
item.description: 为完善自然资源资产管理制度体系，落实统一履行全民所有自然资源资产所有者职责，促进自然资源安全、高效、永续利用和资产保值增值，经党中央、国务院同意，现提出如下意见。 一、总体要求 坚持以习近平新

item.title: 张国清：细致做好受灾群众生活保障 全力支持受灾地区抢修恢复
item.description: 根据习近平总书记重要指示和李强总理要求，中共中央政治局委员、国务院副总理张国清代表党中央、国务院，9日至10日率有关部门负责同志赴广西贵港市、南宁市，指导支持受灾群众生活保障和灾后抢修恢复工作。

item.title: 全国夏粮产量首次突破3000亿斤
item.description: 国家统计局7月10日发布数据显示，2026年全国夏粮产量3014.9亿斤，首次突破3000亿斤，比上年增加20.0亿斤，增长0.7%。

item.title: 丁薛祥出席两院院士大会第二次全体会议并讲话
item.description: 两院院士大会第二次全体会议9日下午在京举行。中共中央政治局常委、国务院副总理丁薛祥出席会议并讲话。

item.title: 习近平同纳米比亚总统恩代特瓦会谈
item.description: 7月10日下午，国家主席习近平在北京人民大会堂同来华进行国事访问的纳米比亚总统恩代特瓦举行会谈。

item.title: 习近平将出席2026世界人工智能大会暨人工智能全球治理高级别会议开幕式并发表主旨讲话
item.description: 2026世界人工智能大会暨人工智能全球治理高级别会议将于7月17日至20日在上海举行。国家主席习近平将出席大会开幕式并发表主旨讲话。

item.title: The Download: a donor conception cap and world models for AI
item.description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Sperm donors need limits, says a European fertilit

item.title: Defence Spending Must Become Defence Capacity
item.description: The Defence Investment Plan shows where more money may go. The harder test is whether ministers can show how spending, assets, maintenance and liabilities become readiness.

item.title: The Download: Claude’s inner workings and OpenAI’s “super app”
item.description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Anthropic found a hidden space where Claude puzzle

item.title: Episode 124: After Ankara: First Reflections on the 2026 NATO Summit
item.description: The 2026 NATO Summit convened at a moment of fragile unity for the alliance. What did it deliver? What did it leave unresolved?

item.title: Middle East live: US strikes Iran for third night as Trump says deal still 'possible'
item.description: The United States launched a fresh salvo of strikes against Iran early Tuesday, marking a new escalation in the resumption of hostilities, even as US President Donald Trump said a deal with Tehran was

item.title: Japan’s bond market is back in play after decades in the wilderness
item.description: JGBs have been selling off amid policy normalization and concerns over Tokyo's spending plans, but experts say that they deserve another look from investors.

item.title: Trump says to deliver 'speech to the nation' Thursday as Iran tensions escalate
item.description: US President Donald Trump said on Monday he will deliver a prime-time address to the nation on Thursday, without disclosing the topic. The announcement came hours after Trump said he would reimpose a

item.title: Trump to claim declassified intel reveals 2020 election interference: MS NOW
item.description: Trump said he will make a "Speech to the Nation on Thursday evening, at 9 P.M. Eastern," without providing further details.

item.title: South Carolina governor taps Lindsey Graham's sister to serve as interim senator
item.description: The death of Sen. Lindsey Graham ignited a scramble among South Carolina Republicans to prepare for a special primary election to replace him on the GOP ticket.

item.title: Ukraine strikes halt shipping on key wheat route as Russian fuel crisis deepens
item.description: A daily update on the latest business and economic news.

item.title: Satya Nadella has issued a shocking warning to companies using AI
item.description: Of all the debates raging about the potential downsides of AI, there is one worry causing the most hand-wringing among AI enthusiasts in Silicon Valley — that the giant AI labs that sell proprietary m

item.title: Ukrainian drone strikes forced Russia to stop shipping in vital sea corridor
item.description: Ukraine’s drone blitz halted Russia’s Sea of Azov shipping in under a week.

item.title: Ebola spreads to more provinces
item.description: In tonight's show, the Ebola outbreak spreads to two more provinces. A Sudanese court sentences paramilitary leader Mohamed Hamdan Daglo and 15 others to death in absentia. Residents of the Niger Delt

item.title: Chipotle is opening its first restaurant in Mexico
item.description: Fast casual chain Chipotle announced Monday that it is opening its first location in Mexico in the Monterrey area.

item.title: Ukraine and allies set up coalition to tackle Russia ballistic missile threat
item.description: Ukraine and key Western allies on Monday announced an ​air-defence coalition that would include jointly developing a new anti-ballistic missile system as an alternative and cheaper solution to the U.S

item.title: Apple says former employee exploited ‘rare’ bug to download confidential files after leaving for OpenAI
item.description: Apple would not comment on the "security breach," which allegedly allowed a former employee to download sensitive files from Apple's network long after he departed the company for rival OpenAI.
